name: sgsimulation
description: Singapore Nation Builder — a browser-based city/nation simulation game starting at independence (1965).

scripts.test: node server/test/smoke.test.js && node server/test/connect.test.js && node server/test/smooth.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: node server/test/browser.test.js && node server/test/visit.test.js && node server/test/roads.test.js && node server/test/runway.test.js && node server/test/railgrade.test.js && node server/test/tracematch.test.js && node server/test/roadsmooth.test.js && node server/test/connectui.test.js && node server/test/pieces.test.js && node server/test/editfix.test.js && node server/test/roadwidth.test.js && node server/test/elevated.test.js && node server/test/builds1965.test.js && node server/test/heritage.test.js && node server/test/importbuild.test.js && node server/test/streetlamps.test.js && node server/test/mrtlink.test.js && node server/test/mrtstops.test.js && node server/test/adjustplace.test.js && node server/test/bridgeverify.mjs && node server/test/mergeverify.mjs && node server/test/cbdlayout.test.js && node server/test/tracer.test.js && node server/test/traceedit.test.js
